chunks.text: Toward Robots that Learn from Everyday Human Experience (EECS-2025-200) by Ademiloluwa Adeniji. DigiRL: Training In-The-Wild Device-Control Agents with Autonomous Reinforcement Learning (EECS-2025-43) by Hao Bai, Mert Cemri, Jiayi Pan, Alane Suhr, Sergey Levine and Aviral Kumar. AutoEval: Autonomous Evaluation of Generalist Robot Manipulation Policies in the Real World (EECS-2025-42) by Paul Zhiyuan Zhou, Pranav Atreya, You Liang Tan, Karl Pertsch and Sergey Levine.

RLIF: Interactive Imitation Learning as Reinforcement Learning (EECS-2024-17) by Jianlan Luo, Perry Dong, Simon Zhai, Yi Ma and Sergey Levine. IDQL: Implicit Q-Learning as an Actor-Critic Method with Diffusion Policies (EECS-2023-62) by Philippe Hansen-Estruch, Ilya Kostrikov, Michael Janner, Kuba Grudzien and Sergey Levine. Learning with Humans in the Loop (EECS-2020-76) by Gokul Swamy.

End-to-End Robotic Reinforcement Learning without Reward Engineering (EECS-2019-40) by Avi Singh, Larry Yang, Kristian Hartikainen, Chelsea Finn and Sergey Levine. Self-supervised Deep Reinforcement Learning with Generalized Computation Graphs for Robot Navigation (EECS-2018-47) by Gregory Kahn, Adam Villaflor, Bosen Ding, Pieter Abbeel and Sergey Levine. Imitation from Observation: Learning to Imitate Behaviors from Raw Video via Context Translation (EECS-2018-37) by YuXuan Liu, Abhishek Gupta, Pieter Abbeel and Sergey Levine.

Learning Compound Multi-Step Controllers under Unknown Dynamics (EECS-2016-41) by Weiqiao Han, Sergey Levine and Pieter Abbeel. Theoretical Investigation of a Non-planar Field Effect Transistor (M122) by S.R. Levine.
